# Voss

> Voss is a terminal-native AI coding harness for bounded repo work, with a .voss control language for confidence-aware, budget-bounded workflows.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://voss.dev/): Product overview for Voss and its terminal-native workflow.
- [Harness](https://voss.dev/harness): Details on the AI coding harness for bounded repository work.
- [ADE](https://voss.dev/ade): Overview of the agent development environment.
- [Language](https://voss.dev/language): Introduction to the .voss control language.
- [Security](https://voss.dev/security): Security model, boundaries, and operational controls.
- [Roadmap](https://voss.dev/roadmap): Planned product direction and upcoming work.

## Reference

- [Documentation](https://docs.tryvoss.dev): Technical documentation for installing, configuring, and using Voss.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/bm9797/Voss): Source repository and issue history for Voss.

## Optional

- [Product Requirements Document](https://github.com/bm9797/Voss/blob/main/PRD.md): Product requirements and background context for Voss.
